experience.title: Junior Engineer
responsibilities: Assisted in the design of electronic circuits for consumer products.
Conducted basic testing and quality checks on prototypes.
Collaborated with the engineering team to gather project requirements.
achievements: Helped reduce testing time by 15% through improved documentation practices.

experience.title: Intern
responsibilities: Supported the engineering team in conducting experiments and data collection.
Maintained laboratory equipment and prepared reports.
Participated in team meetings and provided input on project progress.
achievements: Contributed to a project that received praise for design efficiency.

response.summary: Detail-oriented engineer with experience in electronics and a keen interest in manufacturing processes. Seeking to enhance skills in a more focused engineering role.
